description: Bottom of a letter, containing greetings to several individuals including the Nagid Yosef b. Yeshuʿa. There was a Nagid Yosef in the year 1458 CE (see T-S 8.195 + T-S Ar.50.43), though some sources identify this Nagid as Yosef b. Khalīfa rather than Yosef b. Yeshuʿa (possibly Khalīfa was the family name, so "b. Yeshuʿa" is not incompatible). At least two of the other people greeted in this letter are called "shaykh al-yahūd"; other names are Shemuel; Manṣūr(?) al-Ḥinnāwī, Yosef, Abū l-Saʿd, Fāḍil, Muwaffaq, Avraham, Sulaymān.
